pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:26 defines CLIENT_LIST variable; export_result.sh and verifier.py reference this path
setup_task.sh:23 creates workspace at /default-domain/workspaces/Clients; export_result.sh:22 queries this path with NXQL
setup_task.sh:29 creates client list with this exact name; verifier.py expects this client
Task description states: tag only clients ending with 'LLC'. 'Riverfront Properties' does not end with LLC. Verified in verifier.py:101-118 tagging logic
setup_task.sh:30 creates client list with this exact name; verifier.py expects this client
Task description states: tag clients ending with 'LLC'. 'TechGlobal LLC' ends with LLC. Verified in verifier.py:101-118 tagging logic
Task description (task.json:5-6): 'If a client's name ends with LLC, you must add the tag Corporate'. Verified in verifier.py:102-104 expects 'Corporate' tag
setup_task.sh:31 creates client list with this exact name; verifier.py expects this client
Task description states: tag only clients ending with 'LLC'. 'Sarah Jenkins' does not end with LLC. Verified in verifier.py:101-118 tagging logic

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic client list containing exactly three clients created during setup: Riverfront Properties, TechGlobal LLC, and Sarah Jenkins. The client list file is located at /home/ga/Documents/new_clients.txt and must be onboarded to the /default-domain/workspaces/Clients workspace in Nuxeo. TechGlobal LLC requires the 'Corporate' tag (ending with LLC), while Riverfront Properties and Sarah Jenkins must not be tagged. The verifier validates folder creation timing (anti-gaming check) and tag correctness based on LLC suffix rule.
